note: E-01 evidence: first REAL DeepSeek API call from The One project. Key stored outside repo; never logged.

message.content: Correlation means two variables move together, while causation means one directly causes the other—correlation does not imply causation.
message.reasoning_content: We need to answer in one sentence: difference between correlation and causation. Simple: correlation is when two things change together, causation is when one directly causes the other.
